name: Snake Sorting
description: Get ready for a fun and addictive puzzle challenge in Snake Sorting! Train your brain by sorting colorful snakes into the correct tubes and complete exciting levels filled with relaxing yet challenging gameplay. Tap and move snakes carefully to organize them by color. Sounds easy? Think again! As the levels progress, the puzzles become more challenging and require smart strategies and logical thinking to solve. Enjoy smooth controls, vibrant graphics, and satisfying gameplay designed for puzzle lovers of all ages.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
